claims.intent: Add /test-error route (shared secret + rate limit + three modes) to MCP HTTP app for repeatable Sentry capture validation, including source-code-upload symbolication proof on the current preview release. Update probe script + Phase 2 evidence.
claims.notes: Bootstrap fast-path: registry was empty at re-claim. This is a code change in apps/oak-curriculum-mcp-streamable-http; reviewer roster is code-reviewer + security-reviewer (shared-secret comparison) + test-reviewer.
